business_ideas.idea: Heavy metal yoga studios: fun irreverent branding for yoga targeting metal and alternative audiences
Tough guy multivitamins: repackage boring health category with extreme sports marketing and branding
Apply bold branding and marketing to any boring category; find stale categories and make them cool

predictions.text: Truly innovative ideas seem laughable or make no sense at first; if it makes obvious sense, someone already built it
Bold branding can revitalize any commodity product; marketing matters more than most companies think
